title: Facilities, Racks, Cabling, Power, and Environment · Operations Brief: Net Airflow Locking
summary: Plan an MDF, IDFs, racks, patching, power, cooling, security, and maintenance access for a new site. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net airflow locking increment in a facilities-ready network installation package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Align port-side intake or exhaust, hot and cold airflow, lockable access, and maintenance reach.
Document patch panels, fiber distribution panels, labels, polarity, ports, pathways, and change ownership.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
